          const TStates extends

              initial: Extract<keyof TStates, string>;
              states: TStates & MachineStateMap<
                  MachineContractOf<TData, {}, Extract<keyof TStates, string>>,
              >;
          },
      ): Machine<MachineContractOf<TData, {}, Extract<keyof TStates, string>>>
